form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign second last of 11 at this track October 10 over 1600m, 20 len behind Oursin carrying 60.5kg at $401. Previously first up; sixth of 13 at Uttoxeter September 16 over 3200m, 23 len behind Diesel Line with 75.5kg at $6.50. Will improve on what he does here.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Resuming. Finished off last campaign second last of 11 at this track October 10 over 1600m, 20 len behind Oursin carrying 60.5kg at $401. Previously first up; sixth of 13 at Uttoxeter September 16 over 3200m, 23 len behind Diesel Line with 75.5kg at $6.50. Will improve on what he does here.

form.formComment: Third race start. Promising on debut 2nd of 8 at Chantilly All Weather on November 12 2024 over 1900m, 1.0 len behind Uther carrying 58kg at $5.10. Went for a break before returning 2nd in a small field at Newcastle All Weather on March 21 over 1400m, 5 len behind Recency Bias carrying 60.5kg at $1.40. Further improvement in store.

Went for a break before returning 2nd in a small field at Newcastle All Weather on March 21 over 1400m, 5 len behind Recency Bias carrying 60.5kg at $1.40. Further improvement in store.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 5th of 7 at Haydock Park on October 17 over 1600m, 14 len behind Accredit carrying 59kg at $13. Hard to enthuse.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 5th of 7 at Haydock Park on October 17 over 1600m, 14 len behind Accredit carrying 59kg at $13. Hard to enthuse.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 2nd of 10 at Newcastle All Weather on February 24 over 1600m, 1.0 len behind Exmoor with 56kg at $2.80. Can break through this time.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Was well-supported at debut, 2nd of 10 at Newcastle All Weather on February 24 over 1600m, 1.0 len behind Exmoor with 56kg at $2.80. Can break through this time.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when 5th of 14 at Southwell All Weather on November 26 over 1400m, 8 len behind Organise with 60.5kg at $41. Better for that experience.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 10th of 12 at Deauville on August 14 over 1400m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Northern Champion with 58.5kg at $8.30. Likely improver who can play a role in the finish.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when settled back and ran on when 5th of 10 at Newcastle All Weather on November 6 over 1600m, 2.75 len behind Be Patient carrying 60.5kg at $6.50. Likely improver.

form.formComment: Was at very long odds at debut, 4th of 8 at this track on March 18 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind New Monarch with 58kg at $81. Can improve sharply.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Was at very long odds at debut, 4th of 8 at this track on March 18 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind New Monarch with 58kg at $81. Can improve sharply.

form.formComment: At debut, 5th of 7 at Wolverhampton on March 17 over 1700m, 13 len behind Nobody Knows with 57kg at $17. Needs to improve sharply to threaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). At debut, 5th of 7 at Wolverhampton on March 17 over 1700m, 13 len behind Nobody Knows with 57kg at $17. Needs to improve sharply to threaten.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months ran last of 10 at Chelmsford on March 12 over 1400m, 44 len behind Denver Doll carrying 58kg at $401. Previously second-up ran last of 10 at Wolverhampton on November 8 over 1700m, 35 len behind Sahara King with 58kg at $301. Outclassed.
